description: Station Data pop-out window (label 'stations', tuxlink-2phz). Least-privilege grant: events only — listen/unlisten for the broadcast aprs-weather:new / aprs-telemetry:new streams, plus emit so the snapshot handshake's client side (useEnvStations snapshotRole:'client') can request the accumulated roster from the host window on open (tuxlink-gac1d). It issues no invoke commands and uses OS-native window decorations, so no window-manipulation or shell grants are needed.
